description: Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.

userStories.title: Add task status schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to store a status value for each task so that they can be tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Status column added to tasks table
Allowed values are pending, in progress, done

userStories.title: Add backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As a user, I want the backend to support updating task statuses so that my changes are saved.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend action or endpoint added for updating task status

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the current status of a task on its card so that I know its progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards display the current status as a badge
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task's status from the task list so that I can update it easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Status dropdown or control is visible on task rows in the list
Changing the status updates the task using the backend action
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on specific work.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter control added to the task list view
Filtering updates the list to show only tasks with the selected status
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
